name: Laravel Dusk
description: End-to-end browser testing library for Laravel applications, bundling a standalone ChromeDriver and expressive API for interacting with the DOM.

seo.title: Laravel Dusk — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Laravel Dusk: End-to-end browser testing library for Laravel applications, bundling a standalone ChromeDriver and expressive API for interacting with the DOM.

when_to_use: End-to-end browser tests for Laravel with ChromeDriver
Simulate user interactions: login, forms, file uploads
Take screenshots on test failure for debugging context
CI-ready headless browser testing for Laravel apps

pros: Expressive DSL for forms, auth and assertions
Pairs naturally with existing PHPUnit suite
cons: Flaky on CI without careful tuning
Slower than unit tests, use sparingly
review.verdict: The path of least resistance for Laravel E2E, fine until you truly need multi-browser coverage.
review.best_for: Laravel teams wanting end-to-end tests without leaving the framework
review.not_for: Projects requiring Safari/Firefox coverage or Playwright-grade tooling

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
